The '''Vrakolian''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] with thick skin from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vrakolia system/Legends|Vrakolia]]. They used the [[Vrakolian spinblade|spinblade]] for harmless games of skill. Other species adopted them as weapons.

{{Species-stub}}
